emotional_tone: Objective, authoritative, precise, ultra-low-latency, sterile but beautiful

core_principles: High information density handled via strict hierarchy and progressive disclosure.
Data as UI: Minimal decoration. Typography, spacing, and structural borders create the interface.
Command Center Control: Every widget serves a single decision (e.g., triage threat, monitor latency).
One Page, One Decision: Dashboards should isolate signal from noise with zero unnecessary chrome.
anti_patterns: No heavy gradients or 'soft' UI. No glassmorphism.
No centered alignment for dense data—always left-align strings, right-align numbers.
No teal or generic SaaS blue as primary.

typography.implementation_notes: Use 'tracking-tight' for headers to make them feel structured. Use mono fonts for IP addresses, latency (e.g., 42ms), request IDs, and log outputs.

grid_system.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 lg:gap-6

layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Use the 'Grid Borders' look. Flat backgrounds (panel_bg), sharp 1px borders (border-subtle), no drop shadows (shadow-none). Border-radius should be extremely minimal (rounded-sm or rounded-none).

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 rounded hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium

cards.metric_card: flex flex-col gap-1 border-l-4 border-slate-900 bg-slate-50 p-4

data_tables.style: Dense tabular layout. text-sm. Sticky header. Zebra striping on rows (bg-transparent even, bg-slate-50/50 odd) to aid reading horizontal data.
data_tables.alignment: Numbers/metrics right-aligned. Text/IDs left-aligned. Status badges centered.

charts.styling: Use crisp, 1px stroke lines. Remove background grids or use very faint dashed lines (stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke='#E2E8F0'). Tooltips must be dark and high-contrast.

badges.threat: bg-rose-100 text-rose-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono
badges.safe: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp background shifts. No floaty shadows. Use translate-y-0. border-slate-300 on hover.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.live_data: For real-time log streams, use a subtle background flash (bg-slate-100 to bg-transparent) when a new row is added.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Weight: 'regular' or 'bold'. Keep them small (16px or 20px).

brand_logo.description: Minimalist geometric logo for GuardRail Studio
brand_logo.usage: Top left of the navigation sidebar or header nav.

abstract_texture.usage: Use as a very low-opacity (opacity-10 to opacity-20) background fill in empty states or the auth/login screen to provide depth without noise.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 against its background. Text on red/green status badges must be dark, not white.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid='kebab-case-role-name' to all interactive elements, metric cards, table rows, and charts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not add arbitrary grays; use the Slate scale.
Use Phosphor icons. Make sure to run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
Implement the layout entirely using Tailwind utility classes on standard HTML elements (div, section, span) where Shadcn is not explicitly needed. The project uses .js/.jsx files.
For the live log stream, use JetBrains Mono for the text. Right-align all latency numbers.
Ensure the hero metric cards (e.g., Latency p99, Blocked Requests) span 3 columns each out of a 12-column grid.
Always apply 'data-testid' to key UI elements as defined.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Tables, Dropdowns, Tabs, Dialogs) but strip out rounded corners to match the brutalist 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' style.
The application acts as a SOC dashboard for LLMs, prioritize function and clarity.
